verification.note: Reus-Muns, Jaisinghani, Sankhe, Chowdhury, 'Trust in 5G Open RANs through Machine Learning: RF Fingerprinting on the POWDER PAWR Platform', IEEE GLOBECOM 2020 (GENESYS Lab, Northeastern; open PDF genesys-lab.org/papers/Globecom-Fingerprinting.pdf, verified verbatim via pdftotext). Baseline CNN, base-station identification, trained AND tested on the SAME day -> overall accuracy 99.98% (verbatim: 'trained and tested on the same day gives overall accuracy of 99.98%', Fig. 5a/6a). Our closed_set split is same-day (single fixed capture day, sei-powder-closedset-sameday-strat-site-8010-seed42-v1) matching this protocol -> from_paper (same dataset + same same-day protocol + same metric rank1). Distinct from a future in-repo run.
